en: I think it's this one.
You should be dreaming about me, baby.
I should be on your mind constantly.
ko: 나는 항상 네 마음속에 있어야 해.

en: My agent should be thinking Rod Tidwell.
ko: 내 에이전트는 롯 타이드웰을 생각해야 해.

en: That's when the big dollars are gonna flow.
That's when we truly will materialize the Kwan.
Who is it?
Who is this?
You are speaking to the Rod Tidwell.
I need to speak with my agent.
I need to be my agent.
My agent and I should be one.
I need to be my agent.
My agent and I should be one.
Are you a football player?
Am I a football player?
I'm a schoolteacher about to whoop your ass.
Put Jerry McGuire on the phone.
I'm not saying anything else, just one more thing.
ko: 더 이상 말 안 할게, 단 하나만 더.

en: You don't have the luxury of falling for some drowning man.
ko: 너는 어떤 익사하는 남자에게 빠질 여유가 없어.

en: Be practical.
Practical?
Which top?
Don't tell me to be practical.
Do you know what other women my age are doing right now?
ko: 내 나이 또래의 다른 여자들이 지금 뭐하고 있는지 알아?

en: They're out partying in clubs
trying to get a man, trying to keep a man.
Not me, Laurel. I'm trying to raise a man.
ko: 나는 아니야, 로렐. 나는 남자를 키우고 있어.

en: This one.
